allow: Bash(# Search ALL W3SVC26 logs for any 503 errors grep -rh "" 503 "" ""/c/inetpub/logs/LogFiles/W3SVC26/"")
Bash(# Search ALL IIS log folders for 503 errors mentioning pptx or export grep -rh "" 503 "" /c/inetpub/logs/LogFiles/)
Bash(# Check the W3SVC26 log around the 503 cluster on Feb 23 to understand what happened grep -n "" 503 "" ""/c/inetpub/logs/LogFiles/W3SVC26/u_ex260223.log"")
Bash(# Check other sites'' logs for any 503 on pptx/export grep -rh "" 503 "" /c/inetpub/logs/LogFiles/)
Bash(# Check what site W3SVC26 actually is - look for the most recent export/pptx related 503 in all logs grep -rh ""export\\|pptx"" /c/inetpub/logs/LogFiles/)
Bash(# Check if this app is actually the CDMS folder - which has a web.config too ls ""/c/inetpub/wwwroot/CDMS"")
Bash(# The W3SVC26 site is the presentation builder app - check which wwwroot folder it corresponds to # Look for PresentationBuilder DLL in wwwroot subfolders ls /c/inetpub/wwwroot/*/)
Bash(# Check AIUIUX and CDMS too - they might not have web.config in root for dir in /c/inetpub/wwwroot/AIUIUX /c/inetpub/wwwroot/CDMS; do echo ""=== $dir ==="" && ls ""$dir"")
Bash(# Check stdout log for guide.idino.co.kr \(stdoutLogEnabled=true\) ls ""/c/inetpub/wwwroot/guide.idino.co.kr/logs/"")
Bash(# Check the AIAgentManagement working directory itself for the ASP.NET Core project ls ""/c/OneDrive/OneDrive - IDINO/01_업무/_조예주/_AI/CURSOR/AGENT_IDINO/AIAgentManagement/"")
Bash(# Check TestResultManagement stdout log and any pptx references ls ""/c/inetpub/wwwroot/TestResultManagement.API/logs/"")

Bash(# The project is the AIAgentManagement.csproj in the working dir root # Check for PPTX/export controllers in the source find ""/c/OneDrive/OneDrive - IDINO/01_업무/_조예주/_AI/CURSOR/AGENT_IDINO/AIAgentManagement"" -name ""*.cs"")

Bash(# Now check the web.config for the deployed app that maps to W3SVC26 # W3SVC26 shows the presentation builder - check AIUIUX \(which has the api in it based on earlier 503 pattern\) cat ""/c/inetpub/wwwroot/AIUIUX/web.config"" || echo ""No web.config in AIUIUX"" # Also check the appsettings of SupportIdino for the deployed app settings cat ""/c/inetpub/wwwroot/SupportIdino/appsettings.json"")
Bash(# Check if SupportIdino has a logs folder \(stdout logs\) ls ""/c/inetpub/wwwroot/SupportIdino/logs/"")

Bash(# Check the appsettings of the SupportIdino app \(already got it - it''s a different app\) # Now check the deployed AIAgentManagement app - it''s likely in a different wwwroot folder # The W3SVC26 log shows assets with hashed names matching the ClientApp Vue build # Let''s find which wwwroot folder has AIAgentManagement.dll ls /c/inetpub/wwwroot/*/)
Bash(# Check the AIUIUX folder more carefully - it had ban-words 503 and matches the AI agent system ls ""/c/inetpub/wwwroot/AIUIUX/"")

Bash(# The W3SVC26 log shows the presentation builder. Let''s check which IIS site number corresponds to which folder # by checking iis config through applicationHost.config cat ""/c/Windows/System32/inetsrv/config/applicationHost.config"")

Bash(# Search the recent large stdout logs for ""503"", ""pptx"", ""export"" and crash-related entries grep -i ""503\\|pptx\\|export.*pptx\\|unhandled\\|fatal\\|crash\\|OutOfMemory\\|StackOverflow"" ""/c/publish/AIAgentManagement/logs/stdout_20260226034429_41712.log"")
Bash(# Search for export/pptx/crash in the most recent large log files grep -i ""export\\|pptx"" ""/c/publish/AIAgentManagement/logs/stdout_20260226041248_9028.log"")
Bash(# Check the appsettings.Production.json for configuration that might be relevant cat ""/c/publish/AIAgentManagement/appsettings.Production.json"")
Bash(# Now check the stdout logs around Feb 23 \(the day with 503 bursts\) for any crash or restart details ls -la ""/c/publish/AIAgentManagement/logs/"")
Bash(# Now check the log that started at 06:36:19 - right at the crash cat ""/c/publish/AIAgentManagement/logs/stdout_20260223063619_8440.log"")
Bash(# Count the rapid restart events on Feb 23 between 6:24 and 6:37 \(around the 503 window\) ls -la ""/c/publish/AIAgentManagement/logs/"")
